title: registry-item.json — module descriptor
description: shadcn-shaped descriptor authored in the CLI/registry repo. The applier reads it off disk to resolve dependencies, apply files + npm deps + patches, and copy the module's skill folder(s) into .claude/skills/ (build spec §3.3).

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor validation.

name.description: Module name (lowercase, digits, hyphens). Unique within the registry.

type.description: `saasaloy:capability` scaffolds an app/package and establishes extension points; `saasaloy:feature` extends capabilities by dropping files into their conventions.

dependsOn.description: Modules this one requires. Resolved recursively and topologically sorted behind a confirmation prompt.

dependencies.description: npm packages to install (name or name@version).

files.description: Files to copy into the project. `path` is relative to the module folder; `target` resolves through the project's alias map.

path.description: Source path relative to the module folder (e.g. files/api/routes/waitlist.ts).

envVars.description: Environment variables the module needs: NAME → human description (or default/placeholder).

patches.description: Structural config patches applied at `add` time by the patch engine (issue #7). A flat array where each op names its own target `file` and codemod `kind` (wrangler.jsonc bindings, Better Auth plugin-array insertions); kind-specific payload fields are defined by the engine. An empty array means no patches (ADR 0019).

file.description: Project-relative POSIX path of the file to patch (e.g. apps/api/wrangler.jsonc). No leading slash or @alias.

kind.description: Which codemod applies this patch — `wrangler-binding` upserts a jsonc binding array; `plugin-array` inserts into a TS module plugin array.

scaffolds.description: New workspaces a capability module creates (apps/packages). Each entry births one workspace: copies its files to workspace-root-relative targets and registers the aliases it declares into saasaloy.json (ADR 0013).

workspace.description: New workspace directory, project-relative POSIX (e.g. apps/api). No leading slash or @alias.

aliases.description: Alias → path-prefix map this scaffold registers into saasaloy.json (e.g. { "@api": "apps/api/src" }).

additionalProperties.description: Project-relative path prefix (POSIX separators, no leading slash).

files.description: Files copied into the workspace. `path` is relative to the module folder; `target` is relative to the workspace root (no @alias — the alias root doesn't exist yet).

path.description: Source path relative to the module folder (e.g. files/src/index.ts).

target.description: Destination relative to the workspace root (e.g. src/index.ts). No leading slash or @alias.

agent.description: AI context contributed by this module. A module ships skill folder(s) that `add` copies into .claude/skills/ (recorded in the manifest for a clean `remove`); it never edits the committed AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md.

skills.description: Skill folder(s) relative to the module folder, copied into .claude/skills/.
